page: Microsoft Azure NC16ads_A10_v4 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NCADSA10v4 family. Powered by an x86_64 AMD processor, this server features 16 dedicated vCPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration includes 200.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.5 GB per vCPU.

For accelerated workloads, the instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA A10 GPU providing 22 GB of dedicated VRAM. Storage capabilities include 1475 GB of local disk space, and the instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

Given the combination of dedicated AMD CPU cores, a mid-range NVIDIA A10 GPU, and a generous 200.0 GB memory allocation, this server offers a balanced resource density for GPU-accelerated tasks. It is qualitatively cost-effective for workloads requiring moderate GPU compute paired with substantial system memory, such as deep learning inference, computer vision, graphics rendering, and database systems requiring local high-speed scratch space.
description: Microsoft Azure NC16ads_A10_v4 is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NCADSA10v4 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs paired with 200.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 12.5 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 22 GB of VRAM. For storage, the instance includes 1475 GB of local disk and supports Premium Storage. This configuration is engineered for workloads that require a balance of GPU acceleration, high memory capacity, and local storage, such as AI inference, data analytics, and 3D rendering.

tagline: An AMD-powered virtual machine featuring dedicated vCPUs, a 22 GB NVIDIA A10 GPU, and high-capacity local storage for accelerated workloads.

NVIDIA A10 GPU with 22 GB VRAM
1475 GB local storage with Premium Storage support
Suited for AI inference, graphics rendering, and data analytics
